text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after helping Oguri Cap get back to her dorm, a familiar
distraught face can be seen wandering the academy grounds.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... I'm back here again...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, could you show me the way again? I'm trying to get to the
training course this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I lead Oguri Cap directly to the training course.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
About time ya showed up, Oguri! A bit late, but I'm prouda ya, findin'
your way here all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was worried you'd get lost again. And y'know, since I can't go 'round
leadin' ya everywhere, I thought it'd be a good idea to try leavin' ya
to your own devices...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I got here just fine. This trainer here showed me the way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: AND HERE I THOUGHT YA DID IT ON YOUR OWN!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it's fine. Now that you're here, let's hurry up 'n' get this
scrimmage started.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sounds good. I'll go get ready.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A'ight. Me too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A racer of the utmost caliber, Tamamo Cross has already made her
debut, and she looks ready to prove to Oguri Cap precisely why.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of their race quickly spread around the academy, and rightfully
so—both participants are racers of remarkable talent.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you hear the news? Tamamo and the new girl are gonna race
over at the practice grounds!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! You mean we finally get to see Oguri Cap in action? We gotta see this.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's awfully loud here. Is there some kind of festival going on today?
choice_data_list: They're all here to see you two race.
They're all here to see you two race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Is... that so? That's quite the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hrmm...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Errr, well... I've never been watched by so many people around my
age. It wasn't like this back home...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm not used to it... It's making me restless.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's the same whenever I eat... The other girls are always staring at the
mountain of food on my plate...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And it kinda bothers me, so I've been eating alone in my room
lately...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry for holdin' ya up, Oguri! I'm rea—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The stadium's packed, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Um, Tama?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What? Don't tell me ya got butterflies, Oguri! How're ya s'posed to
run in any of the G1 races?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got just the thing for ya! All ya gotta do is imagine that eeeveryone
watching ya is a piece of takoyaki!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Takoyaki, huh? Hm... I'll give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... Now I'm hungry...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya sure are one peculiar gal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finished with their preparations, the scrimmage between Oguri Cap
and Tama Cross can finally begin.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hnng!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll show ya what a girl from Naniwa's really made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each of their steps digs deep into the ground. It may be just a
scrimmage, but it looks like neither of them are holding back in this
800 meter dash.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nngh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They overtake each other again and again, until finally—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... A perfect tie, huh? Not bad, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You too, Tama. You're faster than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh. Right? But I'm gonna beat ya next time, just ya wait and see.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway! Now that I'm all fired up, might as well go for a quick run.
Catch ya later, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
choice_data_list: What a great race. Good job.
What a great race. Good job.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, you were watching, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's weird. Doctors told me I had a steady heart. Even right after a
race, my heart rate would go straight back to normal.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But... my heart's still pounding. And when I think about the race just
now, my heart... it races even faster.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's a strange sensation, but... I think I like it. Am I... excited? Is this
what excitement feels like?
choice_data_list: You found yourself a worthy rival.
You found yourself a worthy rival.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A rival... Huh...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see. So this is what central has to offer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap stood in place, deep in thought, reflecting upon this
brand-new experience.
